particulars.description: 1) all that freehold property known as or being 1 burrage place, london SE18 7BG as registered at the land registry with title absolute under title number LN97177. 2) part of the freehold property known as or being 3 burrage place, plumstead, london SE18 7BG currently registered at the land registry with title absolute under title number 116956 and comprised within a transfer of part dated the date hereof made between (1) sandy hill (developments) limited and (2) 60 high street LTD. 3) all that freehold property known as or being 71 sandy hill road, london SE18 7BQ as registered at the land registry with title absolute under title number 112222. 4) all that freehold property known as or being 73 sandy hill road, london SE18 7BQ as registered at the land registry with title absolute under title number 112415. 5) all that freehold property known as or being 75 sandy hill road, london SE18 7BQ as registered at the land registry with title absolute under title number SGL255156. 6) all that freehold property known as or being 77 sandy hill road, london SE18 7BQ as registered at the land registry with title absolute under title number SGL287636. 7) all that freehold property known as or being 79 sandy hill road, london SE18 7BQ as registered at the land registry with title absolute under title number SGL81795.
